title: Soft Skills For Tech Professionals
description:
Soft skills are transferrable non-technical skills that are valued in any industry or profession.  
 These skills are especially important in the tech industry as they help you stand out among equally technically qualified professionals. 
 This course is aimed at students of both technical and non-technical backgrounds with at least an Intermediate (B1) level of English.  
  The course is right for you if:  
 
 You want to reduce misunderstandings and communication challenges at work  
 You have been denied opportunities and promotions in the past despite having technical expertise 
 You are a newcomer in tech and feel out of sync with the rest  
 
  Who is this course for?  
 
 Employed tech professionals looking to grow their career 
 Job seekers - from beginners to seasoned professionals 
 Everyone working with or on international tech teams 
 IT students and graduates looking to start their careers on a strong foot.
